summary: Frontend-only static lead-gen site tested end-to-end (desktop + mobile). 16 of 17 critical flows pass: home hero+pricing pills, all 7 nav links, navbar Call button, 5 category cards on home, /category/dogs (4 breeds), /category/cows (HF Cow), /category/goats (3 + ₹600/kg badge), /category/poultry (4 + ₹600/kg on Naatu Koli), /category/eggs, /animal/rajapalayam (gallery thumb switching works), /animal/goat (₹600/kg + cow/goat WA number 917339598737), contact form validation toast for empty submit, contact form WhatsApp window.open intercept (verified URL wa.me/917339598737 with name+interest+phone+message pre-filled), footer phones + map iframe + social links, mobile drawer with all 7 links + working navigation at 414x900, back-to-category, footer category links. ONE FAILURE: Floating CTA toggle is blocked by the platform 'Made with Emergent' badge which intercepts pointer events at bottom-right — toggle is visible but un-clickable (verified via real Playwright pointer-events trace).

ui_bugs.issue: Floating CTA toggle button (fixed bottom-5 right-5 z-40) is occluded by the 'Made with Emergent' platform badge in the same corner. Playwright trace shows `… intercepts pointer events`. Real users tapping bottom-right hit the Emergent badge instead of the contact menu. The floating menu (Dogs/Cocks WA, Cows/Goats WA, Call) never opens.

issues: React hydration warning: <a data-testid='card-whatsapp-{slug}'> is nested inside the parent <a data-testid='animal-card-{slug}'> Link. Invalid HTML (anchor in anchor). Use a <button> with window.open, or move the WA chip outside the Link wrapper.

React hydration warning: a <span> is rendered as a child of <option> inside <select data-testid='form-interest'>. Caused by dev tooling wrapping dynamic text — visually fine but produces console errors.

action_items: Move FloatingCTA away from bottom-right (e.g. bottom-5 left-5, or bottom-24 right-5) OR raise its container z-index above the Emergent badge so clicks are not intercepted. Verify with: open homepage on desktop, click the green floating button — the 3-option menu (float-wa-dog, float-wa-cow, float-call) must appear.

Fix nested anchor in CategoryPage.jsx — the inner WhatsApp <a data-testid='card-whatsapp-{slug}'> is illegal inside the outer Link <a data-testid='animal-card-{slug}'>. Replace inner anchor with a <button onClick={() => window.open(buildWhatsappLink(...), '_blank')}> and keep stopPropagation.
critical_code_review_comments: Anchor-in-anchor nesting in CategoryPage card (animal-card link wraps card-whatsapp link) — invalid HTML, hydration warning on every category page.
FloatingCTA z-index (z-40) is below the Emergent platform badge → entire lead-capture floating menu is unreachable.
Unused imports: ContactPage.jsx imports CONTACTS but only uses CONTACTS.whatsappPrimary/dogCock/cowGoat/etc — fine. AnimalDetailPage.jsx imports CONTACTS but never uses it (dead import).
buildWhatsappLink import path is /app/frontend/src/lib/utils.js — file exists, function works (verified). No issues.
No SEO meta tags / no <title> updates per route (minor, lead-gen site).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: After fixes, re-verify only: (1) Floating CTA toggle opens the menu and the 3 options (float-wa-dog → wa.me/917305644912, float-wa-cow → wa.me/917339598737, float-call → tel:+917305644912) are present with correct hrefs. (2) Category page no longer logs anchor-in-anchor hydration error. All other flows already verified — see this iteration.
rca of the issue: Floating CTA failure RCA: The container is `fixed bottom-5 right-5 z-40`. The Emergent platform badge is also fixed at bottom-right with a higher stacking context. Even with Playwright force=true, the real DOM click event lands on the badge (`… intercepts pointer events`) instead of the toggle button. setOpen never fires, so [data-testid="floating-cta-menu"] never mounts. Mitigation options: (a) reposition (e.g. left-5 or bottom-28 right-5), (b) raise z-index to z-[60] or higher, (c) shrink/offset to leave the bottom-right corner free for the platform badge in preview environments.
